reviews.comment:
Tienen varias filas para cargar nafta. Los fines de semana hay mucha gente. En esta sucursal del A.C.A se puede renovar el registro y también sacar el registro internacional este sin turno. La atención es normal.

(Translated by Google)
They have several lines for fuel. It gets very busy on weekends. At this ACA branch, you can renew your driver's license and also obtain an international driving permit without an appointment. Service is normal.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRaE9mMkpREAE

reviews.comment:
La verdad muy mala atención,me tuvieron 20 min al lado del surtidor sin hacer nada

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, the service was terrible. They kept me standing next to the pump for 20 minutes without doing anything.

reviews.comment:
Telefónicamente atienden mal. Pero en el lugar pude renovar el registro rápidamente.

(Translated by Google)
The phone service is poor. But I was able to renew my registration quickly in person.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBeEtlWnFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fuimos mis hijos , yo y mi padre a renovar varias veces el registro y la verdad la atención es muy buena, rápida y eficiente, no nos hemos demorado más de una hora o un poco más.  Lo recomiendo !

(Translated by Google)
My father, my children, and I went to renew our registration several times, and the service was really good, fast, and efficient. It didn't take us more than an hour or so. I highly recommend it!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRekxIdmFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Para servicio de renovación de licencia de conducir. Todo muy rápido y ordenado. 25 minutos tardé en realizar el trámite.

(Translated by Google)
For a driver's license renewal service. Everything was very quick and organized. It took me 25 minutes to complete the process.
